summary: Completed frontend-only validation of the new documentation bundle and in-app docs hub on the public preview URL. README/Docs/Contributing hub panels render, nav pills jump to correct sections, deep docs cards appear, and updated markdown docs exist with structured beginner-friendly plus developer-focused guidance.
action_items: Optional maintainability follow-up: split /app/frontend/src/App.css (874 lines) into smaller focused style files to improve maintainability and reviewability.
critical_code_review_comments: Requested documentation features are present in runtime and repository docs files.
No blocking docs hub navigation, readability, or layout break was observed in tested desktop flow.
File-size guideline breach remains: /app/frontend/src/App.css is >700 lines.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://caption-player-demo.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). Verified docs hub pills (#readme-guide, #docs-guide, #contributing-guide), docs map cards including api-reference and release-guide, and markdown bundle presence for README/getting-started/component-guide/api-reference/release-guide/CONTRIBUTING.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced in this run.
